title: Commission Approves â‚¬36 Million Danish State Aid Scheme to Boost Use of Sustainable Aviation Fuel
content: The European Commission has approved, under EU State aid rules, a â‚¬36 million (DKK 268 million) Danish measure aimed at reducing greenhouse gas emissions in the domestic aviation sector. This will be achieved through encouraging the use of sustainable aviation fuel (â€˜SAF') for domestic flights. This is the first State aid scheme approved by the Commission that promotes the use of SAF and represents a significant step towards decarbonising the aviation sector, aligning with both national and EU climate objectives.
author: Analysts Account
